query:
SELECT rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(base_capture_rate) as avg_rate, MIN(base_capture_rate) as min_rate, MAX(base_capture_rate) as max_rate
FROM game_monster_catalog
GROUP BY rarity
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT rarity, COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(base_capture_rate) as avg_rate, MIN(base_capture_rate) as min_rate, MAX(base_capture_rate) as max_rate
FROM game_monster_catalog
GROUP BY rarity
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
